ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] Create a landscape painting incorporating the brush forms you have learned.
[ ] Use brushforms to create a pet portrait of your pet or one you want to have in the future.
[ ] Draw a picture of yourself doing a favorite activity in the Fall.
[ ] Use the least used colors in your pastels and create a painting of what you see through a window. You can do this painting each term as the seasons change.

[ ] Create a self-portrait using [complementary colors](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_P8aKs8b-VU&ab_channel=ArtEskwela).
[ ] Create landscapes using [complementary colors.](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=_P8aKs8b-VU&ab_channel=ArtEskwela)
[ ] Draw a picture of yourself doing a favorite activity in the Winter.
[ ] Draw three cupcakes or muffins on a plate. Use a different art medium to add color to each one of the cupcakes/muffins. 
[ ] Use any medium to draw everything you see on your desk or table. 
[ ] Design a pattern for new wallpaper in your kitchen.

[ ] Using the same complementary color concepts from last term, create a still life painting.
[ ] Build a rocket ship or other object using cones, cylinders, circles and squares.
[ ] Draw a picture of yourself doing a favorite activity in the Spring/Summer. 
[ ] Use any medium to draw a bird sitting on a branch.
[ ] Draw a picture of a mug full of a hot, steamy beverage.
[ ] Use any medium to create a picture of a bowl or cone of ice cream that is melting.

resources.title: Draw 50 Birds: The Step-by-Step Way to Draw Chickadees, Peacocks, Toucans, Mallards, and Many More of Our Feathered Friends
resources.author: Lee J. Ames and Tony D'Adamo

resources.title: Looking at Pictures: An Introduction to Art for Young People
resources.author: Joy Richardson

resources.title: Math Art and Drawing Games for Kids
resources.author: Karyn Tripp

resources.title: The Story of Paintings: A History of Art for Children
resources.author: Mick Manning
